Your previous response did not contain a single valid action tag.

Every response MUST use EXACTLY ONE of the following tags:
- <retrieve_tools>...</retrieve_tools>
- <tool_call>...</tool_call>
- <final_answer>...</final_answer>

Do NOT mix multiple tags in one response.
Do NOT omit the tags.
Do NOT ask for tool definitions or tool lists in natural language.
If you need to discover tools, send <retrieve_tools>.

This is attempt {current_attempt} of {max_label_errors}.
In your next assistant response, use exactly one valid tag and the correct JSON format inside it.
